Notice Of Motion And Motionto Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty Brenda Cruz Keith of Brenda Cruz Keith Attorney at Law (415-626-6494) appearing for plaintiff Demmie B Acosta opposing party.
Atty. Jonathan Seigal of Scheer Law Group LLP (415-491-8900) appearing for defendant Mortgage Fund 08, LLC moving party.

Argued - Court having reviewed the pleadings and have heard oral argument. DEFENDANT SUSAN UECKER's Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens is taken under submission. Defendant submit proposed order. Plaintiff prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Brenda Cruz Keith of Law Offices of Brenda Cruz Keith (415-626-6494) appearing for plaintiffs moving party.
Atty. Jonathan Seigel of Scheer Law Group, LLP (415-491-8900) appearing for defendant Susan L. Uecker opposing party.

Argued - Court having reviewed the pleadings and have heard oral argument, Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is taken under submission. Court now rulings as follow: Plaintiffs' order to show cause re: preliminary injunction is denied see signed order for details. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
